title: Addressing epistasis in the design of protein function
research_objectives: Quantify epistatic effects in protein design
Develop models accounting for nonadditive interactions
Improve prediction of protein variant function

problem_statement.challenge: Additive models fail for multi-mutation protein design
problem_statement.limitation: Cannot accurately predict effects of combinations
problem_statement.impact: Reduces efficiency of directed evolution and rational design

methodology.approach: Deep mutational scanning with statistical epistasis analysis
methodology.scope: Multiple protein families and enzyme classes
